title: ALL YOU NEED: APOCALYPSE
description: Apocalyptic Weather, No nether, no the end,...
body:
# 🧟 Survive the Apocalypse
The world doesn’t end suddenly. It decays… slowly.

For the first 10 days, you might find a false sense of peace in the silence. Do not let it deceive you. This mod turns your survival experience into a calculated nightmare. The environment is hostile, and the mobs are no longer just mindless drones—they are hunters.

## Survival Guidelines:

### The Calm (Days 1–10): 
The silence is a trap. The world is watching, waiting for you to let your guard down.

### The Descent (Days 40+): 
This is where the game breaks. The apocalypse is no longer random—it is organized. Starting at Day 40, mobs will attack in coordinated Waves at 10 PM.

### No Sanctuary: 
Think you’re safe on high ground? Think again. Creepers now utilize a "Leap & Detonate" mechanic to drag you down, and mobs have learned to place blocks to reach your fortifications. Walls are merely temporary obstacles to be breached.

## Developer's Note: 
I highly recommend pairing this mod with weapon or firearm add-ons; you are going to need the extra firepower. If you insist on playing "pure hardcore" without high-tier gear, let's be honest: you won't survive past Day 40. I’ve personally struggled to even make it to Day 50—I’ve had to resort to cheating just to stay alive (or maybe I'm just too "noob" at my own mod, who knows?).

The apocalypse was never loud—it was just waiting for you to run out of time.

 



### Thank you for downloading and trying out the mod.
### This project is currently in beta, so feedback, suggestions, and bug reports are greatly appreciated.
